title: Odin - Hypixel Skyblock
description: Hypixel Skyblock mod which focuses on end game Dungeons & Kuudra
body:
Hypixel Skyblock mod tailored for **Dungeons** and **Kuudra**, providing many different solvers and other utilities for end game players.

## Core Dungeon Features

* **Positional Messages** – Trigger custom chat messages when near specific coordinates. Perfect for callouts.
* **Highlight** – Enhanced visuals for your teammates and starred mobs.
* **Dungeon Waypoints** – Set and view custom waypoints inside any dungeon room.
* **Terracotta Timer** – Know exactly when the terracottas respawn in boss fights.
* **Blessing Display** – Shows your current active blessings mid-run.

##  Puzzle & Secret Solvers

* **Puzzle Solvers** – Includes Water Board, Blaze, Creeper Beams, TP Maze, Quiz, Boulder, Ice Fill, and Three Weirdos.
* **Key Highlight** – Automatically highlights Wither and Blood Keys.
* **Secret Clicked** – Get instant audio and visual feedback when secrets are found.

##  Stats & Blood Features

* **Blood Camp** – Helpful features for efficient blood camping strategies.
* **Livid Solver** – Identifies the real Livid in the boss fight.
* **Extra Stats** – Displays extended run statistics at the end of the dungeon.
* **Map Info** – Realtime stats on score, secrets, and deaths.
* **Mimic Detection** – Alerts you when a mimic is killed.

##  Quality of Life

*  **Spring Boots Display** – Know your jump height at a glance.
*  **Leap Menu** – Custom Spirit Leap GUI for fast teleporting.
*  **Terminal Times** – Track how long each terminal phase takes.

## Floor 7 Tools

* **Inactive Waypoints** – Automatically shows inactive terminals, levers, and devices.
* **Terminal Simulator** – Practice P3 terminals outside of dungeons.
* **Melody Message** – Provides simple communication for the Melody terminal.
* **Terminal Sounds** – Plays a sound on correct terminal inputs.
* **Terminal Solver** – Renders the correct solution for each terminal puzzle.
* **Wither Dragons** – Complete M7 toolkit: timers, box health, relics, and more.
* **Arrows Device** – Shows the correct solution for Sharp Shooter.
* **Simon Says + Arrow Align** – Renders real-time solutions for devices in F7.
* **Tick Timers** – Timers for Necron, Goldor, and Storm.

## Kuudra Features

* **Pearl Waypoints** – Automatically displays the locations of pearls during the Kuudra fight for faster pickups and throws.
* **Build Helper** – Real-time feedback during the ballista build phase, showing progress and what's missing.
* **Pre-Spot Alert** – Alerts your party when a pre-fight positioning spot hasn't been triggered.
* **Supply Helper** – Visual aid for supply drops, including timers and drop locations to optimize team coordination.
